query:
SELECT codigoCetip, emissorNome, durationAnos, CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as zspread, isOutlier
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE indexador = 'IPCA SPREAD' AND rating = 'AAA.br'
ORDER BY CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,6)) DESC
LIMIT 20;
